goal: Analytics follow-ups: deck_id on poster events, board-shuffle taps, nav/hero CTA tracking
done: (1) Added deck:getActiveDeckId() to the share payload (reading.js) so share_poster_generated/downloaded now carry deck_id (normalizePayload spreads ...source, preserved). (2) trackShuffleHit gained a source param ('board' vs 'draw'); wired the daily + full board Shuffle buttons (main.js, source:board) and tagged the reveal-animation shuffle source:draw. (3) cta_clicked via one delegated capture-phase listener in common.js initShell for .home-cta-button (draw_today), .home-path-card (daily/ask/full), .bottom-nav__item (nav_<dest>) — bound once per page.
verified: chrome harness: cta_clicked fired {cta:draw_today/daily/nav_decks, location:home} into dataLayer w/ gtm.uniqueEventId. node --check passes; md5 parity canonical=www=ios.
